findings.description: `HttpResponse` class name is not listed as a standalone hint in s2. The section extensively discusses HttpResponse object operations (getting content path, setting InputStream, HttpResponse#write() buffering, returning the object), but only `HttpResponse#write()` appears in hints. A standalone `HttpResponse` entry would allow retrieval when users query the HttpResponse class directly.
findings.source_evidence: Source references `HttpResponse` as a named class throughout the outbound/exception processing steps: 'HTTPレスポンスオブジェクトをリターンして終了する', 'HttpResponse#write()メソッドによってレスポンス内容をHTTPレスポンスオブジェクト内にバッファリング', and the related-handlers table links to 'HttpResponse_'.
